name: StellarShield Security Wave
description: Rewards contributors who add new Guard modules, fix security issues, or improve the StellarShield ecosystem.

contributionTypes.label: New Guard Module
contributionTypes.description: Add a new security module (e.g. time_delay_guard.rs, ip_lock_guard.rs)

contributionTypes.label: Wire P-256 Verification
contributionTypes.description: Implement real secp256r1_verify in auth.rs using Soroban host functions

contributionTypes.label: Token Transfer Integration
contributionTypes.description: Invoke the XLM token contract transfer in guard.rs after velocity check passes

contributionTypes.label: Event Indexer
contributionTypes.description: Index execute_transfer and add_trusted_drip contract events into a persistent DB

contributionTypes.label: Full WebAuthn Verification
contributionTypes.description: Implement full authenticatorData + clientDataJSON verification in backend/routes/auth.ts

contributionTypes.label: Contract Tests
contributionTypes.description: Add soroban-sdk testutils test suite for any contract

contributionTypes.label: Bug Fix
contributionTypes.description: Fix a confirmed bug in any repo
